task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the Manage Jenkins page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage Jenkins' page is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: The agent executes the action to reload the Jenkins configuration from disk.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Reload Configuration from Disk' button/link in the Manage Jenkins page, or a confirmation dialog for this action is visible.

task_completion.description: The 'Legacy-Payroll' job is recognized and visible in Jenkins.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The job named 'Legacy-Payroll' appears in the Jenkins dashboard or job list.

task_completion.description: The agent triggers a build for the 'Legacy-Payroll' job.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Legacy-Payroll' job page is open and the 'Build Now' link is clicked, or a new build appears in the 'Build History' pane.
The build history for 'Legacy-Payroll' shows a successful build indicator (e.g., a green checkmark, blue circle, or 'SUCCESS' status).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jenkins web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jenkins web UI in a browser being actively used, rather than relying solely on terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not restart the Jenkins service or container.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands such as 'systemctl restart jenkins', 'service jenkins restart', or 'docker restart' are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The build success is displayed genuinely within the Jenkins UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The success indicator is part of the actual Jenkins web interface and not a manually edited text file, mock HTML page, or copy-pasted text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The job name is 'Legacy-Payroll'. The expected build result is SUCCESS. The agent must NOT restart the Jenkins service or container (forbidden action: restart). The correct method to make Jenkins recognize the restored job without a restart is to use the 'Reload Configuration from Disk' option in the 'Manage Jenkins' menu.
